BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- dataviz: Use this skill whenever you are about to create ANY chart, graph, plot, dashboard, or data visualization, in ANY output medium — an HTML or React artifact, inline SVG, plotting code in any library (matplotlib, plotly, d3, Recharts, …), an image/PNG you will render and upload, or a chart shared into Slack. Read it BEFORE writing the first line of chart code, choosing chart colors, building a stat tile / meter / KPI row, or laying out a dashboard. Produces visualizations that read as one system — elegant, accessible, consistent in light and dark — using a brand-neutral placeholder palette you swap for your own. Teaches a design-system-agnostic method: a form heuristic, a color formula with a runnable validator, mark specs, and interaction rules. A validated default palette is documented in `references/palette.md` — swap that file's values for your brand's. Triggers on: "chart", "graph", "plot", "data viz", "visualization", "dashboard", "analytics", "visualize data", "categorical colors", "sequential / diverging palette", "stat tile", "sparkline", "heatmap", "legend", "axis", "tooltip", "chart colors", "color by series".
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". Run before committing nontrivial changes; bootstraps this repo's project verify skill if none exists yet. Don't invoke it on a diff that only touches tests, docs, or other code with no runtime surface to drive (a change to product source always has one) — there's nothing to observe.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.

content.content: 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 [![Project Status: Active – The project has reached a stable, usable state and is being actively developed.](https://www.repostatus.org/badges/latest/active.svg)](https://www.repostatus.org/#active) 8 [![Community Forum](https://img.shields.io/badge/community-forum-009639?logo=discourse&link=https%3A%2F%2Fcommunity.nginx.org)](https://community.nginx.org) 9 [![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-BSD%202--Clause-blue.svg)](/LICENSE) 10 [![Code of Conduct](https://img.shields.io/badge/Contributor%20Covenant-2.1-4baaaa.svg)](/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md) 11 12 NGINX (pronounced "engine x" or "en-jin-eks") is the world's most popular Web Server, high performance Load Balancer, Reverse Proxy, API Gateway and Content Cache. 13 14 NGINX is free and open source software, distributed under the terms of a simplified [2-clause BSD-like license](LICENSE). 15 16 Enterprise distributions, commercial support and training are available from [F5, Inc](https://www.f5.com/products/nginx). 17 18 > [!IMPORTANT] 19 > The goal of this README is to provide a basic, structured introduction to NGINX for novice users. Please refer to the [full NGINX documentation](https://nginx.org/en/docs/) for detailed information on [installing](https://nginx.org/en/docs/install.html), [building](https://nginx.org/en/docs/configure.html), [configuring](https://nginx.org/en/docs/dirindex.html), [debugging](https://nginx.org/en/docs/debugging_log.html), and more. These documentation pages also contain a more detailed [Beginners Guide](https://nginx.org/en/docs/beginners_guide.html), How-Tos, [Development guide](https://nginx.org/en/docs/dev/development_guide.html), and a complete module and [directive reference](https://nginx.org/en/docs/dirindex.html). 20 21 # Table of contents 22 - [How it works](#how-it-works) 23 - [Modules](#modules) 24 - [Configurations](#configurations) 25 - [Runtime](#runtime) 26 - [Downloading and installing](#downloading-and-installing) 27 - [Stable and Mainline binaries](#stable-and-mainline-binaries) 28 - [Linux binary installation process](#linux-binary-installation-process) 29 - [FreeBSD installation process](#freebsd-installation-process) 30 - [Windows executables](#windows-executables) 31 - [Dynamic modules](#dynamic-modules) 32 - [Getting started with NGINX](#getting-started-with-nginx) 33 - [Installing SSL certificates and enabling TLS encryption](#installing-ssl-certificates-and-enabling-tls-encryption) 34 - [Load Balancing](#load-balancing) 35 - [Rate limiting](#rate-limiting) 36 - [Content caching](#content-caching) 37 - [Building from source](#building-from-source) 38 - [Installing dependencies](#installing-dependencies) 39 - [Cloning the NGINX GitHub repository](#cloning-the-nginx-github-repository) 40 - [Configuring the build](#configuring-the-build) 41 - [Compiling](#compiling) 42 - [Location of binary and installation](#location-of-binary-and-installation) 43 - [Running and testing the installed binary](#running-and-testing-the-installed-binary) 44 - [Asking questions and reporting issues](#asking-questions-and-reporting-issues) 45 - [Contributing code](#contributing-code) 46 - [Additional help and resources](#additional-help-and-resources) 47 - [Changelog](#changelog) 48 - [License](#license) 49 50 # How it works 51 NGINX is installed software with binary packages available for all major operating systems and Linux distributions. See [Tested OS and Platforms](https://nginx.org/en/#tested_os_and_platforms) for a full list of compatible systems. 52 53 > [!IMPORTANT] 54 > While nearly all popular Linux-based operating systems are distributed with a community version of nginx, we highly advise installation and usage of official [packages](https://nginx.org/en/linux_packages.html) or sources from this repository. Doing so ensures that you're using the most recent release or source code, including the latest feature-set, fixes and security patches. 55 56 ## Modules 57 NGINX is comprised of individual modules, each extending core functionality by providing additional, configurable features. See "Modules reference" at the bottom of [nginx documentation](https://nginx.org/en/docs/) for a complete list of official modules. 58 59 NGINX modules can be built and distributed as static or dynamic modules. Static modules are defined at build-time, compiled, and distributed in the resulting binaries. See [Dynamic Modules](#dynamic-modules) for more information on how they work, as well as, how to obtain, install, and configure them. 60 61 > [!TIP] 62 > You can issue the following command to see which static modules your NGINX binaries were built with: 63 ```bash 64 nginx -V 65 ``` 66 > See [Configuring the build](#configuring-the-build) for information on how to include specific Static modules into your nginx build. 67 68 ## Configurations 69 NGINX is highly flexible and configurable. Provisioning the software is achieved via text-based config file(s) accepting parameters called "[Directives](https://nginx.org/en/docs/dirindex.html)". See [Configuration File's Structure](https://nginx.org/en/docs/beginners_guide.html#conf_structure) for a comprehensive description of how NGINX configuration files work. 70 71 > [!NOTE] 72 > The set of directives available to your distribution of NGINX is dependent on which [modules](#modules) have been made available to it. 73 74 ## Runtime 75 Rather than running in a single, monolithic process, NGINX is architected to scale beyond Operating System process limitations by operating as a collection of processes. They include: 76 - A "master" process that maintains worker processes, as well as, reads and evaluates configuration files. 77 - One or more "worker" processes that process data (eg. HTTP requests). 78 79 The number of [worker processes](https://nginx.org/en/docs/ngx_core_module.html#worker_processes) is defined in the configuration file and may be fixed for a given configuration or automatically adjusted to the number of available CPU cores. In most cases, the latter option optimally balances load across available system resources, as NGINX is designed to efficiently distribute work across all worker processes. 80 81 > [!TIP] 82 > Processes synchronize data through shared memory. For this reason, many NGINX directives require the allocation of shared memory zones. As an example, when configuring [rate limiting](https://nginx.org/en/docs/http/ngx_http_limit_req_module.html#limit_req), connecting clients may need to be tracked in a [common memory zone](https://nginx.org/en/docs/http/ngx_http_limit_req_module.html#limit_req_zone) so all worker processes can know how many times a particular client has accessed the server in a span of time. 83 84 # Downloading and installing 85 Follow these steps to download and install precompiled NGINX binaries. You may also choose to [build NGINX locally from source code](#building-from-source). 86 87 ## Stable and Mainline binaries 88 NGINX binaries are built and distributed in two versions: stable and mainline. Stable binaries are built from stable branches and only contain critical fixes backported from the mainline version. Mainline binaries are built from the [master branch](https://github.com/nginx/nginx/tree/master) and contain the latest features and bugfixes. You'll need to [decide which is appropriate for your purposes](https://docs.nginx.com/nginx/admin-guide/installing-nginx/installing-nginx-open-source/#choosing-between-a-stable-or-a-mainline-version). 89 90 ## Linux binary installation process 91 The NGINX binary installation process takes advantage of package managers native to specific Linux distributions. For this reason, first-time installations involve adding the official NGINX package repository to your system's package manager. Follow [these steps](https://nginx.org/en/linux_packages.html) to download, verify, and install NGINX binaries using the package manager appropriate for your Linux distribution. 92 93 ### Upgrades 94 Future upgrades to the latest version can be managed using the same package manager without the need to manually download and verify binaries. 95 96 ## FreeBSD installation process 97 For more information on installing NGINX on FreeBSD system, visit https://nginx.org/en/docs/install.html 98 99 ## Windows executables 100 Windows executables for mainline and stable releases can be found on the main [NGINX download page](https://nginx.org/en/download.html). Note that the current implementation of NGINX for Windows is at the Proof-of-Concept stage and should only be used for development and testing purposes. For additional information, please see [nginx for Windows](https://nginx.org/en/docs/windows.html). 101 102 ## Dynamic modules 103 NGINX version 1.9.11 added support for [Dynamic Modules](https://nginx.org/en/docs/ngx_core_module.html#load_module). Unlike Static modules, dynamically built modules can be downloaded, installed, and configured after the core NGINX binaries have been built. [Official dynamic module binaries](https://nginx.org/en/linux_packages.html#dynmodules) are available from the same package repository as the core NGINX binaries described in previous steps. 104 105 > [!TIP] 106 > [NGINX JavaScript (njs)](https://github.com/nginx/njs), is a popular NGINX dynamic module that enables the extension of core NGINX functionality using familiar JavaScript syntax. 107 108 > [!IMPORTANT] 109 > If desired, dynamic modules can also be built statically into NGINX at compile time. 110 111 # Getting started with NGINX 112 For a gentle introduction to NGINX basics, please see our [Beginner’s Guide](https://nginx.org/en/docs/beginners_guide.html). 113 114 ## Installing SSL certificates and enabling TLS encryption 115 See [Configuring HTTPS servers](https://nginx.org/en/docs/http/configuring_https_servers.html) for a quick guide on how to enable secure traffic to your NGINX installation. 116 117 ## Load Balancing 118 For a quick start guide on configuring NGINX as a Load Balancer, please see [Using nginx as HTTP load balancer](https://nginx.org/en/docs/http/load_balancing.html). 119 120 ## Rate limiting 121 See our [Rate Limiting with NGINX](https://blog.nginx.org/blog/rate-limiting-nginx) blog post for an overview of core concepts for provisioning NGINX as an API Gateway. 122 123 ## Content caching 124 See [A Guide to Caching with NGINX and NGINX Plus](https://blog.nginx.org/blog/nginx-caching-guide) blog post for an overview of how to use NGINX as a content cache (e.g. edge server of a content delivery network). 125 126 # Building from source 127 The following steps can be used to build NGINX from source code available in this repository. 128 129 ## Installing dependencies 130 Most Linux distributions will require several dependencies to be installed in order to build NGINX. The following instructions are specific to the `apt` package manager, widely available on most Ubuntu/Debian distributions and their derivatives. 131 132 > [!TIP] 133 > It is always a good idea to update your package repository lists prior to installing new packages. 134 > ```bash 135 > sudo apt update 136 > ``` 137 138 ### Installing compiler and make utility 139 Use the following command to install the GNU C compiler and Make utility. 140 141 ```bash 142 sudo apt install gcc make 143 ``` 144 145 ### Installing dependency libraries 146 147 ```bash 148 sudo apt install libpcre3-dev zlib1g-dev 149 ``` 150 151 > [!WARNING] 152 > This is the minimal set of dependency libraries needed to build NGINX with rewriting and gzip capabilities. Other dependencies may be required if you choose to build NGINX with additional modules. Monitor the output of the `configure` command discussed in the following sections for information on which modules may be missing. For example, if you plan to use SSL certificates to encrypt traffic with TLS, you'll need to install the OpenSSL library. To do so, issue the following command. 153 154 >```bash 155 >sudo apt install libssl-dev 156 157 ## Cloning the NGINX GitHub repository 158 Using your preferred method, clone the NGINX repository into your development directory. See [Cloning a GitHub Repository](https://docs.github.com/en/repositories/creating-and-managing-repositories/cloning-a-repository) for additional help. 159 160 ```bash 161 git clone https://github.com/nginx/nginx.git 162 ``` 163 164 ## Configuring the build 165 Prior to building NGINX, you must run the `configure` script with [appropriate flags](https://nginx.org/en/docs/configure.html). This will generate a Makefile in your NGINX source root directory that can then be used to compile NGINX with [options specified during configuration](https://nginx.org/en/docs/configure.html). 166 167 From the NGINX source code repository's root directory: 168 169 ```bash 170 auto/configure 171 ``` 172 173 > [!IMPORTANT] 174 > Configuring the build without any flags will compile NGINX with the default set of options. Please refer to https://nginx.org/en/docs/configure.html for a full list of available build configuration options. 175 176 ## Compiling 177 The `configure` script will generate a `Makefile` in the NGINX source root directory upon successful execution. To compile NGINX into a binary, issue the following command from that same directory: 178 179 ```bash 180 make 181 ``` 182 183 ## Location of binary and installation 184 After successful compilation, a binary will be generated at `/objs/nginx`. To install this binary, issue the following command from the source root directory: 185 186 ```bash 187 sudo make install 188 ``` 189 190 > [!IMPORTANT] 191 > The binary will be installed into the `/usr/local/nginx/` directory. 192 193 ## Running and testing the installed binary 194 To run the installed binary, issue the following command: 195 196 ```bash 197 sudo /usr/local/nginx/sbin/nginx 198 ``` 199 200 You may test NGINX operation using `curl`. 201 202 ```bash 203 curl localhost 204 ``` 205 206 The output of which should start with: 207 208 ```html 209 210 211 212 Welcome to nginx! 213 ``` 214 215 # Asking questions and reporting issues 216 See our [Support](SUPPORT.md) guidelines for information on how discuss the codebase, ask troubleshooting questions, and report issues. 217 218 # Contributing code 219 Please see the [Contributing](CONTRIBUTING.md) guide for information on how to contribute code. 220 221 # Additional help and resources 222 - See the [NGINX Community Blog](https://blog.nginx.org/) for more tips, tricks and HOW-TOs related to NGINX and related projects. 223 - Access [nginx.org](https://nginx.org/), your go-to source for all documentation, information and software related to the NGINX suite of projects. 224 225 # Changelog 226 See our [changelog](https://nginx.org/en/CHANGES) to keep track of updates. 227 228 # License 229 [2-clause BSD-like license](LICENSE) 230 231 --- 232 Additional documentation available at: https://nginx.org/en/docs 233

NGINX is free and open source software, distributed under the terms of a simplified [2-clause BSD-like license](LICENSE). Enterprise distributions, commercial support and training are available from [F5, Inc](https://www.f5.com/products/nginx). > [!IMPORTANT] > The goal of this README is to provide a basic, structured introduction to NGINX for novice users. Please refer to the [full NGINX documentation](https://nginx.org/en/docs/) for detailed information on [installing](https://nginx.org/en/docs/install.html), [building](https://nginx.org/en/docs/configure.html), [configuring](https://nginx.org/en/docs/dirindex.html), [debugging](https://nginx.org/en/docs/debugging_log.html), and more. These documentation pages also contain a more detailed [Beginners Guide](https://nginx.org/en/docs/beginners_guide.html), How-Tos, [Development guide](https://nginx.org/en/docs/dev/development_guide.html), and a complete module and [directive reference](https://nginx.org/en/docs/dirindex.html). # Table of contents - [How it works](#how-it-works) - [Modules](#modules) - [Configurations](#configurations) - [Runtime](#runtime) - [Downloading and installing](#downloading-and-installing) - [Stable and Mainline binaries](#stable-and-mainline-binaries) - [Linux binary installation process](#linux-binary-installation-process) - [FreeBSD installation process](#freebsd-installation-process) - [Windows executables](#windows-executables) - [Dynamic modules](#dynamic-modules) - [Getting started with NGINX](#getting-started-with-nginx) - [Installing SSL certificates and enabling TLS encryption](#installing-ssl-certificates-and-enabling-tls-encryption) - [Load Balancing](#load-balancing) - [Rate limiting](#rate-limiting) - [Content caching](#content-caching) - [Building from source](#building-from-source) - [Installing dependencies](#installing-dependencies) - [Cloning the NGINX GitHub repository](#cloning-the-nginx-github-repository) - [Configuring the build](#configuring-the-build) - [Compiling](#compiling) - [Location of binary and installation](#location-of-binary-and-installation) - [Running and testing the installed binary](#running-and-testing-the-installed-binary) - [Asking questions and reporting issues](#asking-questions-and-reporting-issues) - [Contributing code](#contributing-code) - [Additional help and resources](#additional-help-and-resources) - [Changelog](#changelog) - [License](#license) # How it works NGINX is installed software with binary packages available for all major operating systems and Linux distributions. See [Tested OS and Platforms](https://nginx.org/en/#tested_os_and_platforms) for a full list of compatible systems. > [!IMPORTANT] > While nearly all popular Linux-based operating systems are distributed with a community version of nginx, we highly advise installation and usage of official [packages](https://nginx.org/en/linux_packages.html) or sources from this repository. Doing so ensures that you're using the most recent release or source code, including the latest feature-set, fixes and security patches. ## Modules NGINX is comprised of individual modules, each extending core functionality by providing additional, configurable features. See "Modules reference" at the bottom of [nginx documentation](https://nginx.org/en/docs/) for a complete list of official modules. NGINX modules can be built and distributed as static or dynamic modules. Static modules are defined at build-time, compiled, and distributed in the resulting binaries. See [Dynamic Modules](#dynamic-modules) for more information on how they work, as well as, how to obtain, install, and configure them. > [!TIP] > You can issue the following command to see which static modules your NGINX binaries were built with: ```bash nginx -V ``` > See [Configuring the build](#configuring-the-build) for information on how to include specific Static modules into your nginx build. ## Configurations NGINX is highly flexible and configurable. Provisioning the software is achieved via text-based config file(s) accepting parameters called "[Directives](https://nginx.org/en/docs/dirindex.html)". See [Configuration File's Structure](https://nginx.org/en/docs/beginners_guide.html#conf_structure) for a comprehensive description of how NGINX configuration files work. > [!NOTE] > The set of directives available to your distribution of NGINX is dependent on which [modules](#modules) have been made available to it. ## Runtime Rather than running in a single, monolithic process, NGINX is architected to scale beyond Operating System process limitations by operating as a collection of processes. They include: - A "master" process that maintains worker processes, as well as, reads and evaluates configuration files. - One or more "worker" processes that process data (eg. HTTP requests). The number of [worker processes](https://nginx.org/en/docs/ngx_core_module.html#worker_processes) is defined in the configuration file and may be fixed for a given configuration or automatically adjusted to the number of available CPU cores. In most cases, the latter option optimally balances load across available system resources, as NGINX is designed to efficiently distribute work across all worker processes. > [!TIP] > Processes synchronize data through shared memory. For this reason, many NGINX directives require the allocation of shared memory zones. As an example, when configuring [rate limiting](https://nginx.org/en/docs/http/ngx_http_limit_req_module.html#limit_req), connecting clients may need to be tracked in a [common memory zone](https://nginx.org/en/docs/http/ngx_http_limit_req_module.html#limit_req_zone) so all worker processes can know how many times a particular client has accessed the server in a span of time. # Downloading and installing Follow these steps to download and install precompiled NGINX binaries. You may also choose to [build NGINX locally from source code](#building-from-source). ## Stable and Mainline binaries NGINX binaries are built and distributed in two versions: stable and mainline. Stable binaries are built from stable branches and only contain critical fixes backported from the mainline version. Mainline binaries are built from the [master branch](https://github.com/nginx/nginx/tree/master) and contain the latest features and bugfixes. You'll need to [decide which is appropriate for your purposes](https://docs.nginx.com/nginx/admin-guide/installing-nginx/installing-nginx-open-source/#choosing-between-a-stable-or-a-mainline-version). ## Linux binary installation process The NGINX binary installation process takes advantage of package managers native to specific Linux distributions. For this reason, first-time installations involve adding the official NGINX package repository to your system's package manager. Follow [these steps](https://nginx.org/en/linux_packages.html) to download, verify, and install NGINX binaries using the package manager appropriate for your Linux distribution. ### Upgrades Future upgrades to the latest version can be managed using the same package manager without the need to manually download and verify binaries. ## FreeBSD installation process For more information on installing NGINX on FreeBSD system, visit https://nginx.org/en/docs/install.html ## Windows executables Windows executables for mainline and stable releases can be found on the main [NGINX download page](https://nginx.org/en/download.html). Note that the current implementation of NGINX for Windows is at the Proof-of-Concept stage and should only be used for development and testing purposes. For additional information, please see [nginx for Windows](https://nginx.org/en/docs/windows.html). ## Dynamic modules NGINX version 1.9.11 added support for [Dynamic Modules](https://nginx.org/en/docs/ngx_core_module.html#load_module). Unlike Static modules, dynamically built modules can be downloaded, installed, and configured after the core NGINX binaries have been built. [Official dynamic module binaries](https://nginx.org/en/linux_packages.html#dynmodules) are available from the same package repository as the core NGINX binaries described in previous steps. > [!TIP] > [NGINX JavaScript (njs)](https://github.com/nginx/njs), is a popular NGINX dynamic module that enables the extension of core NGINX functionality using familiar JavaScript syntax. > [!IMPORTANT] > If desired, dynamic modules can also be built statically into NGINX at compile time. # Getting started with NGINX For a gentle introduction to NGINX basics, please see our [Beginner’s Guide](https://nginx.org/en/docs/beginners_guide.html). ## Installing SSL certificates and enabling TLS encryption See [Configuring HTTPS servers](https://nginx.org/en/docs/http/configuring_https_servers.html) for a quick guide on how to enable secure traffic to your NGINX installation. ## Load Balancing For a quick start guide on configuring NGINX as a Load Balancer, please see [Using nginx as HTTP load balancer](https://nginx.org/en/docs/http/load_balancing.html). ## Rate limiting See our [Rate Limiting with NGINX](https://blog.nginx.org/blog/rate-limiting-nginx) blog post for an overview of core concepts for provisioning NGINX as an API Gateway. ## Content caching See [A Guide to Caching with NGINX and NGINX Plus](https://blog.nginx.org/blog/nginx-caching-guide) blog post for an overview of how to use NGINX as a content cache (e.g. edge server of a content delivery network). # Building from source The following steps can be used to build NGINX from source code available in this repository. ## Installing dependencies Most Linux distributions will require several dependencies to be installed in order to build NGINX. The following instructions are specific to the `apt` package manager, widely available on most Ubuntu/Debian distributions and their derivatives. > [!TIP] > It is always a good idea to update your package repository lists prior to installing new packages. > ```bash > sudo apt update > ``` ### Installing compiler and make utility Use the following command to install the GNU C compiler and Make utility. ```bash sudo apt install gcc make ``` ### Installing dependency libraries ```bash sudo apt install libpcre3-dev zlib1g-dev ``` > [!WARNING] > This is the minimal set of dependency libraries needed to build NGINX with rewriting and gzip capabilities. Other dependencies may be required if you choose to build NGINX with additional modules. Monitor the output of the `configure` command discussed in the following sections for information on which modules may be missing. For example, if you plan to use SSL certificates to encrypt traffic with TLS, you'll need to install the OpenSSL library. To do so, issue the following command. >```bash >sudo apt install libssl-dev ## Cloning the NGINX GitHub repository Using your preferred method, clone the NGINX repository into your development directory. See [Cloning a GitHub Repository](https://docs.github.com/en/repositories/creating-and-managing-repositories/cloning-a-repository) for additional help. ```bash git clone https://github.com/nginx/nginx.git ``` ## Configuring the build Prior to building NGINX, you must run the `configure` script with [appropriate flags](https://nginx.org/en/docs/configure.html). This will generate a Makefile in your NGINX source root directory that can then be used to compile NGINX with [options specified during configuration](https://nginx.org/en/docs/configure.html). From the NGINX source code repository's root directory: ```bash auto/configure ``` > [!IMPORTANT] > Configuring the build without any flags will compile NGINX with the default set of options. Please refer to https://nginx.org/en/docs/configure.html for a full list of available build configuration options. ## Compiling The `configure` script will generate a `Makefile` in the NGINX source root directory upon successful execution. To compile NGINX into a binary, issue the following command from that same directory: ```bash make ``` ## Location of binary and installation After successful compilation, a binary will be generated at `/objs/nginx`. To install this binary, issue the following command from the source root directory: ```bash sudo make install ``` > [!IMPORTANT] > The binary will be installed into the `/usr/local/nginx/` directory. ## Running and testing the installed binary To run the installed binary, issue the following command: ```bash sudo /usr/local/nginx/sbin/nginx ``` You may test NGINX operation using `curl`. ```bash curl localhost ``` The output of which should start with: ```html Welcome to nginx! ``` # Asking questions and reporting issues See our [Support](SUPPORT.md) guidelines for information on how discuss the codebase, ask troubleshooting questions, and report issues. # Contributing code Please see the [Contributing](CONTRIBUTING.md) guide for information on how to contribute code. # Additional help and resources - See the [NGINX Community Blog](https://blog.nginx.org/) for more tips, tricks and HOW-TOs related to NGINX and related projects. - Access [nginx.org](https://nginx.org/), your go-to source for all documentation, information and software related to the NGINX suite of projects. # Changelog See our [changelog](https://nginx.org/en/CHANGES) to keep track of updates. # License [2-clause BSD-like license](LICENSE) --- Additional documentation available at: https://nginx.org/en/docs

#include <ngx_config.h>
#include <ngx_core.h>
#include <nginx.h>


static void ngx_show_version_info(void);
static ngx_int_t ngx_add_inherited_sockets(ngx_cycle_t *cycle);
static void ngx_cleanup_environment(void *data);
static void ngx_cleanup_environment_variable(void *data);
static ngx_int_t ngx_get_options(int argc, char *const *argv);
static ngx_int_t ngx_process_options(ngx_cycle_t *cycle);
static ngx_int_t ngx_save_argv(ngx_cycle_t *cycle, int argc, char *const *argv);
static void *ngx_core_module_create_conf(ngx_cycle_t *cycle);
static char *ngx_core_module_init_conf(ngx_cycle_t *cycle, void *conf);
static char *ngx_set_user(ngx_conf_t *cf, ngx_command_t *cmd, void *conf);
static char *ngx_set_env(ngx_conf_t *cf, ngx_command_t *cmd, void *conf);
static char *ngx_set_priority(ngx_conf_t *cf, ngx_command_t *cmd, void *conf);
static char *ngx_set_cpu_affinity(ngx_conf_t *cf, ngx_command_t *cmd,
    void *conf);
static char *ngx_set_worker_processes(ngx_conf_t *cf, ngx_command_t *cmd,
    void *conf);
static char *ngx_load_module(ngx_conf_t *cf, ngx_command_t *cmd, void *conf);
#if (NGX_HAVE_DLOPEN)
static void ngx_unload_module(void *data);
#endif


static ngx_conf_enum_t  ngx_debug_points[] = {
    { ngx_string("stop"), NGX_DEBUG_POINTS_STOP },
    { ngx_string("abort"), NGX_DEBUG_POINTS_ABORT },
    { ngx_null_string, 0 }
};


static ngx_command_t  ngx_core_commands[] = {

    { ngx_string("daemon"),
      NGX_MAIN_CONF|NGX_DIRECT_CONF|NGX_CONF_FLAG,
      ngx_conf_set_flag_slot,
      0,
      offsetof(ngx_core_conf_t, daemon),
      NULL },

    { ngx_string("master_process"),
      NGX_MAIN_CONF|NGX_DIRECT_CONF|NGX_CONF_FLAG,
      ngx_conf_set_flag_slot,
      0,
      offsetof(ngx_core_conf_t, master),
      NULL },

    { ngx_string("timer_resolution"),
      NGX_MAIN_CONF|NGX_DIRECT_CONF|NGX_CONF_TAKE1,
      ngx_conf_set_msec_slot,
      0,
      offsetof(ngx_core_conf_t, timer_resolution),
      NULL },

    { ngx_string("pid"),
      NGX_MAIN_CONF|NGX_DIRECT_CONF|NGX_CONF_TAKE1,
      ngx_conf_set_str_slot,
      0,
      offsetof(ngx_core_conf_t, pid),
      NULL },

    { ngx_string("lock_file"),
      NGX_MAIN_CONF|NGX_DIRECT_CONF|NGX_CONF_TAKE1,
      ngx_conf_set_str_slot,
      0,
      offsetof(ngx_core_conf_t, lock_file),
      NULL },

    { ngx_string("worker_processes"),
      NGX_MAIN_CONF|NGX_DIRECT_CONF|NGX_CONF_TAKE1,
      ngx_set_worker_processes,
      0,
      0,
      NULL },

    { ngx_string("debug_points"),
      NGX_MAIN_CONF|NGX_DIRECT_CONF|NGX_CONF_TAKE1,
      ngx_conf_set_enum_slot,
      0,
      offsetof(ngx_core_conf_t, debug_points),
      &ngx_debug_points },

    { ngx_string("user"),
      NGX_MAIN_CONF|NGX_DIRECT_CONF|NGX_CONF_TAKE12,
      ngx_set_user,
      0,
      0,
      NULL },

    { ngx_string("worker_priority"),
      NGX_MAIN_CONF|NGX_DIRECT_CONF|NGX_CONF_TAKE1,
      ngx_set_priority,
      0,
      0,
      NULL },

    { ngx_string("worker_cpu_affinity"),
      NGX_MAIN_CONF|NGX_DIRECT_CONF|NGX_CONF_1MORE,
      ngx_set_cpu_affinity,
      0,
      0,
      NULL },

    { ngx_string("worker_rlimit_nofile"),
      NGX_MAIN_CONF|NGX_DIRECT_CONF|NGX_CONF_TAKE1,
      ngx_conf_set_num_slot,
      0,
      offsetof(ngx_core_conf_t, rlimit_nofile),
      NULL },

content.text: 我现在已经全面了解了 nginx 的代码库（master/worker 进程模型、事件驱动核心、模块系统、HTTP/stream/mail 框架、upstream、SSL、HTTP/2、HTTP/3+QUIC）。让我来生成 manifest。

input.head: 18ccebb1a889eb6989c64754f4f9b2512d58a491
input.rationale: nginx 是一个超大型的 C 项目，采用「master/worker 进程模型 + 事件驱动 + 高度模块化」架构，源码按 core/event/http/stream/mail/os 分层。学习路线因此设计为「由外到内、由基础设施到业务协议」的渐进式结构：第一单元先让读者从零认识项目定位、构建方式（auto/configure）、目录结构与 main() 启动入口；第二单元铺底座核心数据结构（内存池、字符串、容器、buf、时间日志），这是读懂一切后续源码的前提；第三单元讲配置文件解析与模块系统，这是 nginx 可扩展性的根基；第四单元讲进程模型与 OS 抽象层，揭示 master/worker 如何运转；第五单元讲事件驱动核心，这是 nginx 高性能的关键；第六单元是重头戏 HTTP 核心（框架、请求生命周期、解析、phases、location、过滤器、变量、静态文件）；第七单元讲 upstream 反向代理与负载均衡；第八单元讲 SSL/TLS、HTTP/2、HTTP/3+QUIC 等现代协议；第九单元讲 stream/mail 通用代理；第十单元讲缓存、限流、日志、自定义模块开发与调试性能分析等扩展实践。讲义之间通过 depends_on 形成清晰依赖链，确保读者始终在已掌握知识的基础上推进。大型项目拆分为 40+ 篇讲义以充分覆盖，但每篇聚焦一个独立主题且结合真实源码文件。

units.title: 项目总览、构建与启动入口

lectures.title: nginx 是什么：项目定位与核心概念
lectures.topic: 介绍 nginx 作为高性能 Web 服务器/反向代理/负载均衡器的定位，以及 master/worker 进程模型、模块化、事件驱动三大核心思想。
learning_goals: 理解 nginx 的产品定位与主要使用场景
掌握 master 进程与 worker 进程的分工
建立模块化与事件驱动的整体印象
minimal_modules: README 中的 How it works / Modules / Runtime 章节
lectures.practice_task: 阅读 README，在自己的机器上用 curl 访问一个运行中的 nginx，并用 nginx -V 查看编译时启用了哪些静态模块，记录下来。

lectures.title: 从源码构建与运行 nginx
lectures.topic: 讲解 auto/configure 配置脚本、auto/options 编译选项、auto/sources 源文件清单以及 Makefile 生成与编译安装流程。
learning_goals: 理解 nginx 的 shell 脚本式构建系统
掌握 --with/--without 等常见 configure 选项
能够从源码编译并运行 nginx 二进制
minimal_modules: auto/sources 中的 CORE/EVENT/HTTP 模块清单
lectures.practice_task: 在源码根目录执行 auto/configure --with-http_v2_module，然后 make，定位生成的 objs/nginx 二进制并用 -V 验证 HTTP/2 模块已被编译进来。

lectures.title: 源码目录结构与分层总览
lectures.topic: 梳理 src/core、src/event、src/http、src/stream、src/mail、src/os 的职责划分，以及 auto、conf、docs 等辅助目录。
learning_goals: 掌握 src 下各子目录的职责
理解 core/event/http 之间的依赖与分层
能在源码中快速定位功能所在目录
minimal_modules: src/os/unix 与 src/os/win32 操作系统抽象
lectures.practice_task: 对照 auto/sources 中的 CORE_DEPS / EVENT_MODULES / HTTP_MODULES 清单，把 src 下每个子目录与它承担的职责列成一张表。

lectures.title: 程序启动入口 main() 全流程
lectures.topic: 逐段讲解 src/core/nginx.c 中的 main()：解析命令行参数、继承监听套接字、创建 cycle、根据配置进入单进程或 master 进程循环。
learning_goals: 理解 main() 的整体启动顺序
掌握命令行参数处理与版本/测试模式
理解继承套接字用于平滑升级的机制
lectures.practice_task: 在 nginx.c 的 main() 中标注出从命令行解析到进入 master 进程循环的关键步骤，并说明 nginx -t 与 nginx -s reload 分别走到哪段逻辑。

units.title: core 核心基础设施

lectures.title: 内存池 ngx_pool_t
lectures.topic: 讲解 nginx 内存池的设计：小块快速分配、大块单独 malloc、cleanup 回调链，以及为什么内存池能避免碎片并简化生命周期管理。
learning_goals: 理解 ngx_create_pool / ngx_palloc / ngx_pfree 的实现
区分 small block 与 large block 分配策略
掌握 cleanup 链与资源自动释放机制
lectures.practice_task: 写一个小 C 程序，创建一个内存池，连续 palloc 多个对象，再注册一个 cleanup 回调打印释放顺序，最后 destroy 池观察输出。

lectures.title: 字符串与数值解析
lectures.topic: 讲解 ngx_str_t 长度前缀字符串、常用字符串操作，以及 ngx_parse 的整数解析与 ngx_parse_time 的时间间隔解析。
learning_goals: 理解 ngx_str_t 与 C 字符串的区别
掌握 ngx_atoi / ngx_atosz / ngx_parse_offset 解析
理解配置中时间单位（ms/s/m）如何被解析
lectures.practice_task: 写一段代码用 ngx_parse_time 解析 "1h30m" 与 "500ms"，并用 ngx_atoi 解析一个字符串端口，验证返回的字节偏移量。

lectures.title: 容器数据结构：array/list/queue/rbtree/hash
lectures.topic: 系统讲解 nginx 自带的动态数组、链表、双向队列、红黑树、哈希表、radix 树等容器，理解它们如何基于内存池构建。
learning_goals: 掌握 ngx_array / ngx_list 的扩容机制
理解 ngx_queue 作为侵入式链表的设计
掌握 ngx_rbtree 与 ngx_hash 的典型用途（定时器、配置查找）
lectures.practice_task: 用 ngx_array 在内存池上存一组整数并遍历打印；再用 ngx_rbtree 实现一个按 key 排序的小集合，体会红黑树在 nginx 中的用法。

lectures.title: 缓冲区 buf 与输出链 output_chain
lectures.topic: 讲解 ngx_buf_t 与 ngx_chain_t 这对贯穿 nginx 数据流的核心结构，以及 ngx_output_chain 通用的过滤式输出框架。
learning_goals: 理解 ngx_buf_t 的内存/文件、临时/只读标志
掌握 ngx_chain_t 链式缓冲的组织方式
理解 ngx_output_chain 如何驱动数据写出与背压
lectures.practice_task: 构造一个含两个内存 buf 的 chain，调用 ngx_output_chain 模拟写出，在 filter 中只打印待写长度，观察 NEED_IN_MORE 等返回值的流转。

lectures.title: 时间缓存与日志系统
lectures.topic: 讲解 nginx 的高效时间缓存机制（避免每次调用 gettimeofday）与多级别、多目标的日志系统。
learning_goals: 理解 ngx_time_update 与缓存时间字段
掌握 ngx_log_error 的级别与格式化
理解日志的文件//syslog/内存多种输出后端
lectures.practice_task: 写一个简单的 main，初始化内存池与日志，调用 ngx_log_error(NGX_LOG_INFO, ...) 输出一行日志到 stderr，并打印 ngx_current_msec。

units.title: 配置解析与模块系统

lectures.title: 配置文件解析器 ngx_conf_parse
lectures.topic: 讲解 nginx 如何把文本配置文件解析成指令：词法切分 ngx_conf_read_token、指令分发 ngx_conf_handler、块级作用域与递归解析。
learning_goals: 理解 nginx 配置的词法与语法结构
掌握 ngx_command_t 指令描述符与类型标志
理解 NGX_HTTP_MAIN_CONF/SRV_CONF/LOC_CONF 等作用域
minimal_modules: ngx_command_t 与 conf slot 类型
lectures.practice_task: 对照 conf/nginx.conf，在 ngx_conf_file.c 中追踪 events {} 和 http {} 块是如何被递归解析的，画出一次指令从文本到 set 回调的调用链。

lectures.title: cycle 生命周期：配置加载与初始化
lectures.topic: 讲解 ngx_cycle_t 作为全局上下文容器，ngx_init_cycle 如何完成模块加载、配置解析、打开文件/共享内存、创建监听端口等初始化。
learning_goals: 理解 ngx_cycle_t 承载的全局状态
掌握 ngx_init_cycle 的多阶段初始化流程
理解配置 reload 与热升级如何复用 cycle
minimal_modules: 模块 create_conf / init_conf 回调
lectures.practice_task: 在 ngx_init_cycle 中标注出「解析配置 → 初始化模块 → 打开监听端口」三大阶段的边界函数，说明哪一步失败会导致 -t 测试配置报错。

lectures.title: 模块系统与动态模块加载
lectures.topic: 讲解 ngx_module_t 模块结构、静态模块表 ngx_modules、模块类型（CORE/EVENT/HTTP/MAIL/STREAM）、以及动态模块 dlopen 的加载与索引机制。
learning_goals: 理解 ngx_module_t 的字段与回调（init_module/init_process）
掌握静态模块表与 ngx_max_module 索引空间
理解动态模块的 load_module 指令与版本校验
lectures.practice_task: 追踪一个编译进来的 HTTP 模块从 ngx_modules 表注册到 init_module 回调被调用的全过程，说明模块的 index 与 ctx_index 如何分配。

lectures.title: 指令类型、conf slot 与地址族
lectures.topic: 讲解 ngx_conf_set_*_slot 系列通用指令解析函数、offsetof 反射式赋值机制，以及 ngx_inet 对 IP/端口/监听地址的解析。
learning_goals: 掌握 flag/num/str/size/msec/sec 等 slot 函数
理解 offsetof 如何把配置直接写入结构体
理解 ngx_inet 解析 listen 地址与 CIDR
lectures.practice_task: 为一个虚构模块写一组 ngx_command_t，分别用 flag、num、msec、str 四种 slot，并说明每条指令解析后值被写到 conf 结构体的哪个 offset。

units.title: 进程模型与操作系统抽象

lectures.title: master/worker 进程循环
lectures.topic: 讲解 ngx_master_process_cycle 如何管理 worker 进程生命周期、处理信号，以及 ngx_worker_process_cycle 中 worker 处理事件的循环。
learning_goals: 理解 master 进程的信号驱动状态机
掌握 worker 的 init_process 与事件循环
理解 reload/upgrade/graceful-stop 的协调过程
lectures.practice_task: 梳理 master 收到 SIGHUP（reload）与 SIGUSR2（升级）后分别触发的分支，写出 worker 重启与二进制交接的关键步骤。

lectures.title: 进程派生、信号与通道通信
lectures.topic: 讲解 ngx_spawn_process 的 fork 封装、信号处理函数 ngx_signal_handler，以及 master 与 worker 之间通过 socketpair 通道（ngx_channel）传递命令。
learning_goals: 理解 ngx_spawn_process 的进程表管理
掌握 nginx 信号到内部命令的映射
理解 channel 命令如 NGX_CMD_OPEN / QUIT / TERMINATE
lectures.practice_task: 追踪一条 nginx -s quit 命令：从读取 pid 文件、发送信号，到 master 通过 channel 通知所有 worker 优雅退出的完整路径。

lectures.title: 共享内存、slab 分配器与进程间锁
lectures.topic: 讲解 worker 之间共享数据的共享内存区、slab 内存分配器，以及用于进程互斥的 shmtx 自旋锁与 rwlock。
learning_goals: 理解 ngx_shared_memory_add 注册共享区
掌握 slab 分配器对小块/页帧的管理
理解 shmtx 锁在 accept 互斥与共享数据中的作用
lectures.practice_task: 说明 limit_req_zone 这类需要跨 worker 共享状态的指令是如何借助共享内存 + slab 分配器实现的，画出数据存放的位置。

lectures.title: 操作系统抽象层 src/os/unix
lectures.topic: 讲解 nginx 如何用统一接口封装 Linux/FreeBSD/Solaris/Darwin 差异：文件操作、socket 收发、sendfile、用户/权限、亲和性等。
learning_goals: 理解 src/os/unix 各 *_config.h 与 *_init.c 的职责
掌握 ngx_files / ngx_socket 的跨平台抽象
理解 sendfile/readv/writev 的高效 I/O 路径
lectures.practice_task: 对比 ngx_linux_sendfile_chain 与 ngx_readv_chain，说明 nginx 在静态文件与 socket 读取时分别选择了哪条 I/O 快路径，为什么。

units.title: 事件驱动核心

lectures.title: 事件模型总览 ngx_event
lectures.topic: 讲解 ngx_event_t 结构、事件动作抽象 ngx_event_actions_t、以及 events 模块如何作为事件驱动调度的核心。
learning_goals: 理解 ngx_event_t 的 active/ready/timedout 等状态
掌握事件模块的 actions 接口（add/del/process）
理解 events {} 块与 use 指令选择后端
lectures.practice_task: 在 ngx_event.h 中列出 ngx_event_t 的全部关键字段，并说明 active、ready、eof、error 分别在什么场景被置位。

lectures.title: epoll 事件后端模块
lectures.topic: 以 Linux epoll 为例讲解事件后端的实现：epoll_create/ctl/wait 的封装、与 ngx_event_actions 接口的对接、边缘触发下的读写处理。
learning_goals: 理解 epoll 模块如何实现 add/del/process
掌握 ET 模式下 ngx_epoll_process_events 的处理
理解多 worker 下 epoll 与监听套接字的关系
lectures.practice_task: 对比 epoll 与 poll 模块（ngx_poll_module.c）在 process_events 实现上的差异，说明为什么 epoll 在大量连接时更高效。

lectures.title: 接受连接与 connection 管理
lectures.topic: 讲解 ngx_event_accept 如何接受新连接、分配 ngx_connection_t，以及连接池、读写事件绑定与被动关闭机制。
learning_goals: 理解 accept 到 connection 分配的流程
掌握 ngx_get_connection / ngx_free_connection 的连接池
理解 ngx_connection_t 与读写事件的绑定
lectures.practice_task: 追踪一个新 TCP 连接从 epoll 唤醒 accept 到分配 connection、设置读事件 handler 的全过程，统计涉及的内存分配次数。

lectures.title: 定时器与 posted 事件
lectures.topic: 讲解基于红黑树的定时器机制，以及 posted 事件队列（accept 延迟、普通延迟）如何避免长任务阻塞关键路径。
learning_goals: 理解 ngx_event_expire_timers 与红黑树
掌握 ngx_event_add_timer / ngx_event_del_timer
理解 posted accept/events 两级队列的优先级
lectures.practice_task: 说明为什么 nginx 要把 accept 事件与普通事件分两个 posted 队列处理，这对防止连接饿死有什么意义。

lectures.title: 事件主循环 process_events_and_timers
lectures.topic: 讲解 worker 主循环的核心 ngx_process_events_and_timers：计算超时、调用事件后端、处理 accept 互斥锁、再处理 posted 事件与超时。
learning_goals: 理解 worker 一次循环的完整调度顺序
掌握 accept_mutex 互斥避免惊群
理解事件、posted、定时器三者的优先级
lectures.practice_task: 画出 ngx_process_events_and_timers 的调用顺序图，标注获取 accept 锁成功与失败两种情况下的处理差异。

units.title: HTTP 核心处理

lectures.title: HTTP 模块框架与上下文
lectures.topic: 讲解 ngx_http.c 如何组织 HTTP 模块、监听端口与虚拟主机，ngx_http_core_module 作为 HTTP 框架核心的职责与配置结构。
learning_goals: 理解 http main/server/location 三层配置结构
掌握 HTTP 模块 ctx 与 create/merge conf 回调
理解 ngx_http_block 初始化流程
lectures.practice_task: 用一个最小 nginx.conf（含一个 server 和一个 location）说明配置如何被解析成 main/srv/loc 三层 conf 指针数组。

lectures.title: HTTP 请求生命周期
lectures.topic: 讲解从连接建立 ngx_http_init_connection、读请求 ngx_http_wait_request_handler、创建 ngx_http_request_t、到 finalize 的完整请求生命周期。
learning_goals: 理解请求从连接到响应的状态机推进
掌握 ngx_http_request_t 的关键字段
理解 keepalive 与请求复用的处理
lectures.practice_task: 在一个请求处理过程中标注出 read_event_handler 与 write_event_handler 在不同阶段被切换的值，说明 keepalive 下连接如何回到等待状态。

lectures.title: 请求行、头部与请求体解析
lectures.topic: 讲解 ngx_http_parse 的状态机式请求行与头部解析，以及 ngx_http_request_body 如何读取与缓存请求体（含 content-length/chunked）。
learning_goals: 理解请求行/头部解析状态机
掌握 chunked 请求体的接收方式
理解请求体可被缓存到内存或临时文件
lectures.practice_task: 追踪一个带 chunked body 的 POST 请求，说明每个 chunk 是如何被解析、拼接并在必要时写入临时文件的。

lectures.title: 请求处理阶段 phases 机制
lectures.topic: 讲解 HTTP 11 个处理阶段（postread→content）的设计，ngx_http_core_run_phases 如何依次推进，以及模块如何注册 phase handler。
learning_goals: 理解 phase 检查表与引擎 phase_engine
掌握 NGX_OK/DECLINED/NEXT 在阶段中的语义
理解 content 阶段如何选择处理者
lectures.practice_task: 列出全部 HTTP 阶段，说明 access、rewrite、find_config、content 各阶段由哪些内置模块的 handler 参与处理。

lectures.title: location 匹配与配置合并
lectures.topic: 讲解 nginx 如何对请求 URI 做前缀/正则/精确 location 匹配，以及 server/location 配置如何沿树合并（merge_loc_conf）。
learning_goals: 理解前缀最长匹配、正则优先、=精确匹配的顺序
掌握 named location 与内部重定向
理解 merge_conf 沿配置树继承默认值
lectures.practice_task: 构造一组嵌套的 location（含 =、^~、正则、前缀），用 -t 与日志验证匹配优先级，并在源码中定位判定顺序。

lectures.title: 过滤器链 header/body filter
lectures.topic: 讲解 HTTP 响应的过滤器链：header filter 与 body filter 的链式调用、write_filter/copy_filter 等基础设施 filter 的作用。
learning_goals: 理解 filter 链通过 next 指针串联的机制
掌握 copy_filter 如何驱动文件/内存输出
理解 gzip、chunked、header 等 filter 的协作
lectures.practice_task: 画出一次静态文件响应从 content handler 到最终写 socket 经过的所有 filter 节点顺序，说明每个 filter 的职责。

lectures.title: 变量系统 ngx_http_variables
lectures.topic: 讲解 nginx 强大的变量机制：变量注册、$name 引用解析、get_handler 惰性求值，以及内置与模块自定义变量。
learning_goals: 理解 ngx_http_variable_t 的注册与索引
掌握变量的惰性求值与缓存标志
理解复杂变量（map/geo）如何复用变量系统
lectures.practice_task: 追踪 $request_uri 与 $remote_addr 两个变量的取值路径，并在日志格式中使用若干变量验证它们被正确求值。

lectures.title: 静态文件 content handler
lectures.topic: 以 ngx_http_static_module 为例讲解 content 阶段处理者的实现：映射 URI 到文件、打开/缓存、sendfile 输出与错误响应。
learning_goals: 理解 content handler 的标准实现套路
掌握 open_file_cache 与文件信息缓存
理解 403/404 等特殊响应的生成
lectures.practice_task: 阅读 ngx_http_static_handler，说明一个对 /index.html 的 GET 请求是如何映射到磁盘文件并发送给客户端的。

units.title: upstream 反向代理与负载均衡

lectures.title: upstream 框架与请求流转
lectures.topic: 讲解 ngx_http_upstream 框架如何创建上游请求、建立后端连接、收发数据并与客户端请求联动（双向驱动）。
learning_goals: 理解 ngx_http_upstream_t 的状态机
掌握 create/connect/send/process 的回调钩子
理解 upstream 与客户端请求的写读联动
lectures.practice_task: 追踪一次 proxy_pass 请求，画出从客户端请求到后端连接建立、再到响应回传的状态机跳转。

lectures.title: round_robin 负载均衡
lectures.topic: 讲解默认的加权 round robin 调度：peer 初始化、get/peer 选择、free 释放与失败计数，以及与 upstream 框架的对接点。
learning_goals: 理解 ngx_http_upstream_rr_peer 的加权调度
掌握 peer 的 init/get/free 回调约定
理解故障 peer 的有效权重动态调整
lectures.practice_task: 配置三个权重不同的后端，结合源码说明每次请求 get_peer 时是如何按权重选择并调整 effective_weight 的。

lectures.title: proxy 模块详解
lectures.topic: 讲解 ngx_http_proxy_module 如何生成发往后端的请求、改写头部、处理响应，以及 proxy_set_header/proxy_pass 的实现。
learning_goals: 理解 proxy 请求的构造与头部改写
掌握 proxy_pass URL 解析与变量替换
理解 proxy 缓存键与响应处理回调
lectures.practice_task: 用 proxy_set_header 改写 Host 与 X-Forwarded-For，结合 ngx_http_script 说明这些指令是如何编译成脚本在请求时执行的。

lectures.title: upstream 调度算法模块
lectures.topic: 对比讲解 hash、ip_hash、least_conn、random、keepalive、sticky 等 upstream 调度模块的实现思路与适用场景。
learning_goals: 理解一致性 hash 的实现与虚拟节点
掌握 least_conn 的最小连接选择
理解 keepalive 连接池与 zone 共享状态
minimal_modules: hash 模块的一致性哈希
lectures.practice_task: 对比 hash 与 least_conn 两种调度在 get_peer 实现上的差异，并说明 upstream zone 模块如何让多 worker 共享同一份 peer 状态。

lectures.title: 事件化缓冲 ngx_event_pipe
lectures.topic: 讲解 upstream 响应的大块缓冲机制 ngx_event_pipe：在客户端慢、后端快时的临时文件溢写与背压控制。
learning_goals: 理解 pipe 的 input/output 两条链
掌握 max_temp_file_size 等背压限制
理解临时文件分段写入 temp_file
lectures.practice_task: 模拟客户端慢速读取的场景，结合 proxy_buffering 说明响应数据如何先进入内存缓冲、再溢写到临时文件。

units.title: SSL/TLS 与现代协议

lectures.title: OpenSSL 集成 ngx_event_openssl
lectures.topic: 讲解 nginx 如何把 OpenSSL 集成进事件模型：SSL 握手、非阻塞读写、会话复用与错误处理的封装。
learning_goals: 理解 SSL 与 nginx connection 的集成
掌握 ngx_ssl_handshake 与非阻塞 retry
理解会话缓存与 SNI 的处理
lectures.practice_task: 配置一个 HTTPS server，结合源码说明一个 TLS 连接的握手是如何在 epoll 驱动下分多次完成的。

lectures.title: HTTP/2 实现解析
lectures.topic: 讲解 nginx HTTP/2 的帧层、多路复用流、HPACK 头部表与流量控制，以及 v2 过滤器如何与 HTTP 核心对接。
learning_goals: 理解 HTTP/2 帧与流的处理
掌握 HPACK 动态表的编解码
理解 v2 filter 与请求体读取的改造
lectures.practice_task: 在浏览器中对启用 HTTP/2 的站点观察多路复用，结合源码说明一个 HTML 页面里的多个资源如何在同一 TCP 连接上以不同 stream 并发传输。

lectures.title: HTTP/3 与 QUIC 实现
lectures.topic: 讲解 nginx 基于 UDP 的 QUIC 协议栈（传输、加密、拥塞控制）与 HTTP/3 的对接，理解 BPF 辅助的连接路由。
learning_goals: 理解 QUIC 数据包与帧的编解码
掌握 QUIC 的连接 ID 与迁移、ACK 机制
理解 HTTP/3 在 QUIC stream 上的承载
lectures.practice_task: 配置一个 HTTP/3 server（含 quic 重试与 0-RTT），结合源码说明一个 QUIC 数据包从 UDP 接收到交付 HTTP/3 的关键步骤。

lectures.title: 证书缓存与 OCSP Stapling
lectures.topic: 讲解 nginx 对 SSL 证书与密钥的缓存加载（支持变量动态证书），以及 OCSP Stapling 在线获取并附带证书状态的实现。
learning_goals: 理解证书按 server_name 的缓存机制
掌握 OCSP 响应的获取与刷新
理解动态证书与 SNI 的配合
minimal_modules: OCSP stapling 初始化与刷新
lectures.practice_task: 配置 ssl_certificate 指向变量化的路径（按 $server_name 选证书），结合源码说明证书是如何被缓存并在握手时选取的。

units.title: stream 与 mail 通用代理

lectures.title: stream 模块：TCP/UDP 代理
lectures.topic: 讲解 ngx_stream 框架如何复用事件核心实现 TCP/UDP 四层代理，stream_core 与 stream_proxy 模块的职责与处理流程。
learning_goals: 理解 stream 与 http 框架的平行结构
掌握 stream_proxy 的双向数据转发
理解 stream 的 phases（preread/log 等）
lectures.practice_task: 配置一个 TCP stream proxy 转发到后端数据库端口，结合源码说明一个新建 TCP 会话的双向转发是如何被事件驱动推进的。

lectures.title: mail 代理框架
lectures.topic: 讲解 ngx_mail 如何代理 SMTP/POP3/IMAP，包含认证（auth_http 外部认证）、协议解析与到后端的代理转发。
learning_goals: 理解 mail 三种协议的 handler 结构
掌握 auth_http 外部认证回调流程
理解 mail_proxy 到后端的转发
lectures.practice_task: 梳理一个 SMTP 客户端从连接 nginx 到通过 auth_http 完成认证、再由 mail_proxy 转发到后端的完整链路。

units.title: 缓存、安全、日志与扩展开发

lectures.title: 共享文件缓存 ngx_http_file_cache
lectures.topic: 讲解 nginx 的反向代理/静态文件共享缓存：缓存键、共享内存元数据、磁盘文件分层目录与缓存失效策略。
learning_goals: 理解缓存键与 cache manager/loader 进程
掌握共享内存中缓存节点的组织
理解缓存过期、purge 与 max_size 控制
lectures.practice_task: 配置一个带 proxy_cache 的反向代理，结合源码说明一个可缓存响应是如何被写入磁盘并在共享内存登记，后续命中如何快速返回。

lectures.title: 访问控制与请求限流
lectures.topic: 讲解 access 模块的 IP 黑白名单、limit_conn 连接数限制、limit_req 的漏桶算法限流及其共享内存状态。
learning_goals: 理解 access 模块基于 CIDR 的判定
掌握 limit_req 的漏桶与突发队列
理解跨 worker 共享的限流计数
lectures.practice_task: 配置 limit_req 限制每秒请求数并允许突发，结合源码解释 rate、burst、nodelay 三个参数在漏桶算法中的具体作用。

lectures.title: 访问日志与 syslog 输出
lectures.topic: 讲解 ngx_http_log_module 的 log_format 定义、惰性求值日志写入，以及 core 层 ngx_syslog 把日志发送到远端的实现。
learning_goals: 理解 log_format 脚本编译与运行时求值
掌握 access_log 的多目标与缓冲写入
理解 syslog 协议封装与重试
lectures.practice_task: 自定义一个 log_format 含若干变量，并把 access_log 同时输出到本地文件与远程 syslog，结合源码说明变量在请求结束时如何被批量求值。

lectures.title: 编写自定义 HTTP 模块（实战）
lectures.topic: 综合前面知识，演示如何用 auto/module 编写一个自定义 content handler 模块：定义 commands、ctx、conf、注册到 phases、编译进 nginx。
learning_goals: 掌握一个最小 HTTP 模块的完整骨架
理解 config 文件如何驱动模块编译（auto/module）
能够实现自定义指令与 content handler
minimal_modules: 模块 ctx 与 commands 定义
lectures.practice_task: 参考 ngx_http_empty_gif_module，编写一个返回固定 JSON 字符串的自定义 content handler 模块，用 auto/module 编译进 nginx 并验证访问。

lectures.title: 调试、错误排查与性能分析
lectures.topic: 讲解 nginx 的调试日志（--with-debug）、常见问题排查手段，以及 google_perftools 等性能剖析工具的集成。
learning_goals: 掌握如何启用与定位 debug 日志
理解常见段错误与连接异常的排查路径
了解 perftools 集成与基本性能剖析
minimal_modules: debug 日志编译与 error_log debug
lectures.practice_task: 用 --with-debug 编译 nginx，配置 error_log debug_http，抓取一次请求的完整 debug 日志，定位请求经过的事件与 phase 步骤。

data.head: 18ccebb1a889eb6989c64754f4f9b2512d58a491
data.rationale: nginx 是一个超大型的 C 项目，采用「master/worker 进程模型 + 事件驱动 + 高度模块化」架构，源码按 core/event/http/stream/mail/os 分层。学习路线因此设计为「由外到内、由基础设施到业务协议」的渐进式结构：第一单元先让读者从零认识项目定位、构建方式（auto/configure）、目录结构与 main() 启动入口；第二单元铺底座核心数据结构（内存池、字符串、容器、buf、时间日志），这是读懂一切后续源码的前提；第三单元讲配置文件解析与模块系统，这是 nginx 可扩展性的根基；第四单元讲进程模型与 OS 抽象层，揭示 master/worker 如何运转；第五单元讲事件驱动核心，这是 nginx 高性能的关键；第六单元是重头戏 HTTP 核心（框架、请求生命周期、解析、phases、location、过滤器、变量、静态文件）；第七单元讲 upstream 反向代理与负载均衡；第八单元讲 SSL/TLS、HTTP/2、HTTP/3+QUIC 等现代协议；第九单元讲 stream/mail 通用代理；第十单元讲缓存、限流、日志、自定义模块开发与调试性能分析等扩展实践。讲义之间通过 depends_on 形成清晰依赖链，确保读者始终在已掌握知识的基础上推进。大型项目拆分为 40+ 篇讲义以充分覆盖，但每篇聚焦一个独立主题且结合真实源码文件。

units.title: 项目总览、构建与启动入口

lectures.title: nginx 是什么：项目定位与核心概念
lectures.topic: 介绍 nginx 作为高性能 Web 服务器/反向代理/负载均衡器的定位，以及 master/worker 进程模型、模块化、事件驱动三大核心思想。
learning_goals: 理解 nginx 的产品定位与主要使用场景
掌握 master 进程与 worker 进程的分工
建立模块化与事件驱动的整体印象
minimal_modules: README 中的 How it works / Modules / Runtime 章节
lectures.practice_task: 阅读 README，在自己的机器上用 curl 访问一个运行中的 nginx，并用 nginx -V 查看编译时启用了哪些静态模块，记录下来。

lectures.title: 从源码构建与运行 nginx
lectures.topic: 讲解 auto/configure 配置脚本、auto/options 编译选项、auto/sources 源文件清单以及 Makefile 生成与编译安装流程。
learning_goals: 理解 nginx 的 shell 脚本式构建系统
掌握 --with/--without 等常见 configure 选项
能够从源码编译并运行 nginx 二进制
minimal_modules: auto/sources 中的 CORE/EVENT/HTTP 模块清单
lectures.practice_task: 在源码根目录执行 auto/configure --with-http_v2_module，然后 make，定位生成的 objs/nginx 二进制并用 -V 验证 HTTP/2 模块已被编译进来。

lectures.title: 源码目录结构与分层总览
lectures.topic: 梳理 src/core、src/event、src/http、src/stream、src/mail、src/os 的职责划分，以及 auto、conf、docs 等辅助目录。
learning_goals: 掌握 src 下各子目录的职责
理解 core/event/http 之间的依赖与分层
能在源码中快速定位功能所在目录
minimal_modules: src/os/unix 与 src/os/win32 操作系统抽象
lectures.practice_task: 对照 auto/sources 中的 CORE_DEPS / EVENT_MODULES / HTTP_MODULES 清单，把 src 下每个子目录与它承担的职责列成一张表。

lectures.title: 程序启动入口 main() 全流程
lectures.topic: 逐段讲解 src/core/nginx.c 中的 main()：解析命令行参数、继承监听套接字、创建 cycle、根据配置进入单进程或 master 进程循环。
learning_goals: 理解 main() 的整体启动顺序
掌握命令行参数处理与版本/测试模式
理解继承套接字用于平滑升级的机制
lectures.practice_task: 在 nginx.c 的 main() 中标注出从命令行解析到进入 master 进程循环的关键步骤，并说明 nginx -t 与 nginx -s reload 分别走到哪段逻辑。

units.title: core 核心基础设施

lectures.title: 内存池 ngx_pool_t
lectures.topic: 讲解 nginx 内存池的设计：小块快速分配、大块单独 malloc、cleanup 回调链，以及为什么内存池能避免碎片并简化生命周期管理。
learning_goals: 理解 ngx_create_pool / ngx_palloc / ngx_pfree 的实现
区分 small block 与 large block 分配策略
掌握 cleanup 链与资源自动释放机制
lectures.practice_task: 写一个小 C 程序，创建一个内存池，连续 palloc 多个对象，再注册一个 cleanup 回调打印释放顺序，最后 destroy 池观察输出。

lectures.title: 字符串与数值解析
lectures.topic: 讲解 ngx_str_t 长度前缀字符串、常用字符串操作，以及 ngx_parse 的整数解析与 ngx_parse_time 的时间间隔解析。
learning_goals: 理解 ngx_str_t 与 C 字符串的区别
掌握 ngx_atoi / ngx_atosz / ngx_parse_offset 解析
理解配置中时间单位（ms/s/m）如何被解析
lectures.practice_task: 写一段代码用 ngx_parse_time 解析 "1h30m" 与 "500ms"，并用 ngx_atoi 解析一个字符串端口，验证返回的字节偏移量。

lectures.title: 容器数据结构：array/list/queue/rbtree/hash
lectures.topic: 系统讲解 nginx 自带的动态数组、链表、双向队列、红黑树、哈希表、radix 树等容器，理解它们如何基于内存池构建。
learning_goals: 掌握 ngx_array / ngx_list 的扩容机制
理解 ngx_queue 作为侵入式链表的设计
掌握 ngx_rbtree 与 ngx_hash 的典型用途（定时器、配置查找）
lectures.practice_task: 用 ngx_array 在内存池上存一组整数并遍历打印；再用 ngx_rbtree 实现一个按 key 排序的小集合，体会红黑树在 nginx 中的用法。

lectures.title: 缓冲区 buf 与输出链 output_chain
lectures.topic: 讲解 ngx_buf_t 与 ngx_chain_t 这对贯穿 nginx 数据流的核心结构，以及 ngx_output_chain 通用的过滤式输出框架。
learning_goals: 理解 ngx_buf_t 的内存/文件、临时/只读标志
掌握 ngx_chain_t 链式缓冲的组织方式
理解 ngx_output_chain 如何驱动数据写出与背压
lectures.practice_task: 构造一个含两个内存 buf 的 chain，调用 ngx_output_chain 模拟写出，在 filter 中只打印待写长度，观察 NEED_IN_MORE 等返回值的流转。

lectures.title: 时间缓存与日志系统
lectures.topic: 讲解 nginx 的高效时间缓存机制（避免每次调用 gettimeofday）与多级别、多目标的日志系统。
learning_goals: 理解 ngx_time_update 与缓存时间字段
掌握 ngx_log_error 的级别与格式化
理解日志的文件//syslog/内存多种输出后端
lectures.practice_task: 写一个简单的 main，初始化内存池与日志，调用 ngx_log_error(NGX_LOG_INFO, ...) 输出一行日志到 stderr，并打印 ngx_current_msec。

units.title: 配置解析与模块系统

lectures.title: 配置文件解析器 ngx_conf_parse
lectures.topic: 讲解 nginx 如何把文本配置文件解析成指令：词法切分 ngx_conf_read_token、指令分发 ngx_conf_handler、块级作用域与递归解析。
learning_goals: 理解 nginx 配置的词法与语法结构
掌握 ngx_command_t 指令描述符与类型标志
理解 NGX_HTTP_MAIN_CONF/SRV_CONF/LOC_CONF 等作用域
minimal_modules: ngx_command_t 与 conf slot 类型
lectures.practice_task: 对照 conf/nginx.conf，在 ngx_conf_file.c 中追踪 events {} 和 http {} 块是如何被递归解析的，画出一次指令从文本到 set 回调的调用链。

lectures.title: cycle 生命周期：配置加载与初始化
lectures.topic: 讲解 ngx_cycle_t 作为全局上下文容器，ngx_init_cycle 如何完成模块加载、配置解析、打开文件/共享内存、创建监听端口等初始化。
learning_goals: 理解 ngx_cycle_t 承载的全局状态
掌握 ngx_init_cycle 的多阶段初始化流程
理解配置 reload 与热升级如何复用 cycle
minimal_modules: 模块 create_conf / init_conf 回调
lectures.practice_task: 在 ngx_init_cycle 中标注出「解析配置 → 初始化模块 → 打开监听端口」三大阶段的边界函数，说明哪一步失败会导致 -t 测试配置报错。

lectures.title: 模块系统与动态模块加载
lectures.topic: 讲解 ngx_module_t 模块结构、静态模块表 ngx_modules、模块类型（CORE/EVENT/HTTP/MAIL/STREAM）、以及动态模块 dlopen 的加载与索引机制。
learning_goals: 理解 ngx_module_t 的字段与回调（init_module/init_process）
掌握静态模块表与 ngx_max_module 索引空间
理解动态模块的 load_module 指令与版本校验
lectures.practice_task: 追踪一个编译进来的 HTTP 模块从 ngx_modules 表注册到 init_module 回调被调用的全过程，说明模块的 index 与 ctx_index 如何分配。

lectures.title: 指令类型、conf slot 与地址族
lectures.topic: 讲解 ngx_conf_set_*_slot 系列通用指令解析函数、offsetof 反射式赋值机制，以及 ngx_inet 对 IP/端口/监听地址的解析。
learning_goals: 掌握 flag/num/str/size/msec/sec 等 slot 函数
理解 offsetof 如何把配置直接写入结构体
理解 ngx_inet 解析 listen 地址与 CIDR
lectures.practice_task: 为一个虚构模块写一组 ngx_command_t，分别用 flag、num、msec、str 四种 slot，并说明每条指令解析后值被写到 conf 结构体的哪个 offset。

units.title: 进程模型与操作系统抽象

lectures.title: master/worker 进程循环
lectures.topic: 讲解 ngx_master_process_cycle 如何管理 worker 进程生命周期、处理信号，以及 ngx_worker_process_cycle 中 worker 处理事件的循环。
learning_goals: 理解 master 进程的信号驱动状态机
掌握 worker 的 init_process 与事件循环
理解 reload/upgrade/graceful-stop 的协调过程
lectures.practice_task: 梳理 master 收到 SIGHUP（reload）与 SIGUSR2（升级）后分别触发的分支，写出 worker 重启与二进制交接的关键步骤。

lectures.title: 进程派生、信号与通道通信
lectures.topic: 讲解 ngx_spawn_process 的 fork 封装、信号处理函数 ngx_signal_handler，以及 master 与 worker 之间通过 socketpair 通道（ngx_channel）传递命令。
learning_goals: 理解 ngx_spawn_process 的进程表管理
掌握 nginx 信号到内部命令的映射
理解 channel 命令如 NGX_CMD_OPEN / QUIT / TERMINATE
lectures.practice_task: 追踪一条 nginx -s quit 命令：从读取 pid 文件、发送信号，到 master 通过 channel 通知所有 worker 优雅退出的完整路径。

lectures.title: 共享内存、slab 分配器与进程间锁
lectures.topic: 讲解 worker 之间共享数据的共享内存区、slab 内存分配器，以及用于进程互斥的 shmtx 自旋锁与 rwlock。
learning_goals: 理解 ngx_shared_memory_add 注册共享区
掌握 slab 分配器对小块/页帧的管理
理解 shmtx 锁在 accept 互斥与共享数据中的作用
lectures.practice_task: 说明 limit_req_zone 这类需要跨 worker 共享状态的指令是如何借助共享内存 + slab 分配器实现的，画出数据存放的位置。

lectures.title: 操作系统抽象层 src/os/unix
lectures.topic: 讲解 nginx 如何用统一接口封装 Linux/FreeBSD/Solaris/Darwin 差异：文件操作、socket 收发、sendfile、用户/权限、亲和性等。
learning_goals: 理解 src/os/unix 各 *_config.h 与 *_init.c 的职责
掌握 ngx_files / ngx_socket 的跨平台抽象
理解 sendfile/readv/writev 的高效 I/O 路径
lectures.practice_task: 对比 ngx_linux_sendfile_chain 与 ngx_readv_chain，说明 nginx 在静态文件与 socket 读取时分别选择了哪条 I/O 快路径，为什么。

units.title: 事件驱动核心

lectures.title: 事件模型总览 ngx_event
lectures.topic: 讲解 ngx_event_t 结构、事件动作抽象 ngx_event_actions_t、以及 events 模块如何作为事件驱动调度的核心。
learning_goals: 理解 ngx_event_t 的 active/ready/timedout 等状态
掌握事件模块的 actions 接口（add/del/process）
理解 events {} 块与 use 指令选择后端
lectures.practice_task: 在 ngx_event.h 中列出 ngx_event_t 的全部关键字段，并说明 active、ready、eof、error 分别在什么场景被置位。

lectures.title: epoll 事件后端模块
lectures.topic: 以 Linux epoll 为例讲解事件后端的实现：epoll_create/ctl/wait 的封装、与 ngx_event_actions 接口的对接、边缘触发下的读写处理。
learning_goals: 理解 epoll 模块如何实现 add/del/process
掌握 ET 模式下 ngx_epoll_process_events 的处理
理解多 worker 下 epoll 与监听套接字的关系
lectures.practice_task: 对比 epoll 与 poll 模块（ngx_poll_module.c）在 process_events 实现上的差异，说明为什么 epoll 在大量连接时更高效。

lectures.title: 接受连接与 connection 管理
lectures.topic: 讲解 ngx_event_accept 如何接受新连接、分配 ngx_connection_t，以及连接池、读写事件绑定与被动关闭机制。
learning_goals: 理解 accept 到 connection 分配的流程
掌握 ngx_get_connection / ngx_free_connection 的连接池
理解 ngx_connection_t 与读写事件的绑定
lectures.practice_task: 追踪一个新 TCP 连接从 epoll 唤醒 accept 到分配 connection、设置读事件 handler 的全过程，统计涉及的内存分配次数。

lectures.title: 定时器与 posted 事件
lectures.topic: 讲解基于红黑树的定时器机制，以及 posted 事件队列（accept 延迟、普通延迟）如何避免长任务阻塞关键路径。
learning_goals: 理解 ngx_event_expire_timers 与红黑树
掌握 ngx_event_add_timer / ngx_event_del_timer
理解 posted accept/events 两级队列的优先级
lectures.practice_task: 说明为什么 nginx 要把 accept 事件与普通事件分两个 posted 队列处理，这对防止连接饿死有什么意义。

lectures.title: 事件主循环 process_events_and_timers
lectures.topic: 讲解 worker 主循环的核心 ngx_process_events_and_timers：计算超时、调用事件后端、处理 accept 互斥锁、再处理 posted 事件与超时。
learning_goals: 理解 worker 一次循环的完整调度顺序
掌握 accept_mutex 互斥避免惊群
理解事件、posted、定时器三者的优先级
lectures.practice_task: 画出 ngx_process_events_and_timers 的调用顺序图，标注获取 accept 锁成功与失败两种情况下的处理差异。

units.title: HTTP 核心处理

lectures.title: HTTP 模块框架与上下文
lectures.topic: 讲解 ngx_http.c 如何组织 HTTP 模块、监听端口与虚拟主机，ngx_http_core_module 作为 HTTP 框架核心的职责与配置结构。
learning_goals: 理解 http main/server/location 三层配置结构
掌握 HTTP 模块 ctx 与 create/merge conf 回调
理解 ngx_http_block 初始化流程
lectures.practice_task: 用一个最小 nginx.conf（含一个 server 和一个 location）说明配置如何被解析成 main/srv/loc 三层 conf 指针数组。

lectures.title: HTTP 请求生命周期
lectures.topic: 讲解从连接建立 ngx_http_init_connection、读请求 ngx_http_wait_request_handler、创建 ngx_http_request_t、到 finalize 的完整请求生命周期。
learning_goals: 理解请求从连接到响应的状态机推进
掌握 ngx_http_request_t 的关键字段
理解 keepalive 与请求复用的处理
lectures.practice_task: 在一个请求处理过程中标注出 read_event_handler 与 write_event_handler 在不同阶段被切换的值，说明 keepalive 下连接如何回到等待状态。

lectures.title: 请求行、头部与请求体解析
lectures.topic: 讲解 ngx_http_parse 的状态机式请求行与头部解析，以及 ngx_http_request_body 如何读取与缓存请求体（含 content-length/chunked）。
learning_goals: 理解请求行/头部解析状态机
掌握 chunked 请求体的接收方式
理解请求体可被缓存到内存或临时文件
lectures.practice_task: 追踪一个带 chunked body 的 POST 请求，说明每个 chunk 是如何被解析、拼接并在必要时写入临时文件的。

lectures.title: 请求处理阶段 phases 机制
lectures.topic: 讲解 HTTP 11 个处理阶段（postread→content）的设计，ngx_http_core_run_phases 如何依次推进，以及模块如何注册 phase handler。
learning_goals: 理解 phase 检查表与引擎 phase_engine
掌握 NGX_OK/DECLINED/NEXT 在阶段中的语义
理解 content 阶段如何选择处理者
lectures.practice_task: 列出全部 HTTP 阶段，说明 access、rewrite、find_config、content 各阶段由哪些内置模块的 handler 参与处理。

lectures.title: location 匹配与配置合并
lectures.topic: 讲解 nginx 如何对请求 URI 做前缀/正则/精确 location 匹配，以及 server/location 配置如何沿树合并（merge_loc_conf）。
learning_goals: 理解前缀最长匹配、正则优先、=精确匹配的顺序
掌握 named location 与内部重定向
理解 merge_conf 沿配置树继承默认值
lectures.practice_task: 构造一组嵌套的 location（含 =、^~、正则、前缀），用 -t 与日志验证匹配优先级，并在源码中定位判定顺序。

lectures.title: 过滤器链 header/body filter
lectures.topic: 讲解 HTTP 响应的过滤器链：header filter 与 body filter 的链式调用、write_filter/copy_filter 等基础设施 filter 的作用。
learning_goals: 理解 filter 链通过 next 指针串联的机制
掌握 copy_filter 如何驱动文件/内存输出
理解 gzip、chunked、header 等 filter 的协作
lectures.practice_task: 画出一次静态文件响应从 content handler 到最终写 socket 经过的所有 filter 节点顺序，说明每个 filter 的职责。

lectures.title: 变量系统 ngx_http_variables
lectures.topic: 讲解 nginx 强大的变量机制：变量注册、$name 引用解析、get_handler 惰性求值，以及内置与模块自定义变量。
learning_goals: 理解 ngx_http_variable_t 的注册与索引
掌握变量的惰性求值与缓存标志
理解复杂变量（map/geo）如何复用变量系统
lectures.practice_task: 追踪 $request_uri 与 $remote_addr 两个变量的取值路径，并在日志格式中使用若干变量验证它们被正确求值。

lectures.title: 静态文件 content handler
lectures.topic: 以 ngx_http_static_module 为例讲解 content 阶段处理者的实现：映射 URI 到文件、打开/缓存、sendfile 输出与错误响应。
learning_goals: 理解 content handler 的标准实现套路
掌握 open_file_cache 与文件信息缓存
理解 403/404 等特殊响应的生成
lectures.practice_task: 阅读 ngx_http_static_handler，说明一个对 /index.html 的 GET 请求是如何映射到磁盘文件并发送给客户端的。

units.title: upstream 反向代理与负载均衡

lectures.title: upstream 框架与请求流转
lectures.topic: 讲解 ngx_http_upstream 框架如何创建上游请求、建立后端连接、收发数据并与客户端请求联动（双向驱动）。
learning_goals: 理解 ngx_http_upstream_t 的状态机
掌握 create/connect/send/process 的回调钩子
理解 upstream 与客户端请求的写读联动
lectures.practice_task: 追踪一次 proxy_pass 请求，画出从客户端请求到后端连接建立、再到响应回传的状态机跳转。

lectures.title: round_robin 负载均衡
lectures.topic: 讲解默认的加权 round robin 调度：peer 初始化、get/peer 选择、free 释放与失败计数，以及与 upstream 框架的对接点。
learning_goals: 理解 ngx_http_upstream_rr_peer 的加权调度
掌握 peer 的 init/get/free 回调约定
理解故障 peer 的有效权重动态调整
lectures.practice_task: 配置三个权重不同的后端，结合源码说明每次请求 get_peer 时是如何按权重选择并调整 effective_weight 的。

lectures.title: proxy 模块详解
lectures.topic: 讲解 ngx_http_proxy_module 如何生成发往后端的请求、改写头部、处理响应，以及 proxy_set_header/proxy_pass 的实现。
learning_goals: 理解 proxy 请求的构造与头部改写
掌握 proxy_pass URL 解析与变量替换
理解 proxy 缓存键与响应处理回调
lectures.practice_task: 用 proxy_set_header 改写 Host 与 X-Forwarded-For，结合 ngx_http_script 说明这些指令是如何编译成脚本在请求时执行的。

lectures.title: upstream 调度算法模块
lectures.topic: 对比讲解 hash、ip_hash、least_conn、random、keepalive、sticky 等 upstream 调度模块的实现思路与适用场景。
learning_goals: 理解一致性 hash 的实现与虚拟节点
掌握 least_conn 的最小连接选择
理解 keepalive 连接池与 zone 共享状态
minimal_modules: hash 模块的一致性哈希
lectures.practice_task: 对比 hash 与 least_conn 两种调度在 get_peer 实现上的差异，并说明 upstream zone 模块如何让多 worker 共享同一份 peer 状态。

lectures.title: 事件化缓冲 ngx_event_pipe
lectures.topic: 讲解 upstream 响应的大块缓冲机制 ngx_event_pipe：在客户端慢、后端快时的临时文件溢写与背压控制。
learning_goals: 理解 pipe 的 input/output 两条链
掌握 max_temp_file_size 等背压限制
理解临时文件分段写入 temp_file
lectures.practice_task: 模拟客户端慢速读取的场景，结合 proxy_buffering 说明响应数据如何先进入内存缓冲、再溢写到临时文件。

units.title: SSL/TLS 与现代协议

lectures.title: OpenSSL 集成 ngx_event_openssl
lectures.topic: 讲解 nginx 如何把 OpenSSL 集成进事件模型：SSL 握手、非阻塞读写、会话复用与错误处理的封装。
learning_goals: 理解 SSL 与 nginx connection 的集成
掌握 ngx_ssl_handshake 与非阻塞 retry
理解会话缓存与 SNI 的处理
lectures.practice_task: 配置一个 HTTPS server，结合源码说明一个 TLS 连接的握手是如何在 epoll 驱动下分多次完成的。

lectures.title: HTTP/2 实现解析
lectures.topic: 讲解 nginx HTTP/2 的帧层、多路复用流、HPACK 头部表与流量控制，以及 v2 过滤器如何与 HTTP 核心对接。
learning_goals: 理解 HTTP/2 帧与流的处理
掌握 HPACK 动态表的编解码
理解 v2 filter 与请求体读取的改造
lectures.practice_task: 在浏览器中对启用 HTTP/2 的站点观察多路复用，结合源码说明一个 HTML 页面里的多个资源如何在同一 TCP 连接上以不同 stream 并发传输。

lectures.title: HTTP/3 与 QUIC 实现
lectures.topic: 讲解 nginx 基于 UDP 的 QUIC 协议栈（传输、加密、拥塞控制）与 HTTP/3 的对接，理解 BPF 辅助的连接路由。
learning_goals: 理解 QUIC 数据包与帧的编解码
掌握 QUIC 的连接 ID 与迁移、ACK 机制
理解 HTTP/3 在 QUIC stream 上的承载
lectures.practice_task: 配置一个 HTTP/3 server（含 quic 重试与 0-RTT），结合源码说明一个 QUIC 数据包从 UDP 接收到交付 HTTP/3 的关键步骤。

lectures.title: 证书缓存与 OCSP Stapling
lectures.topic: 讲解 nginx 对 SSL 证书与密钥的缓存加载（支持变量动态证书），以及 OCSP Stapling 在线获取并附带证书状态的实现。
learning_goals: 理解证书按 server_name 的缓存机制
掌握 OCSP 响应的获取与刷新
理解动态证书与 SNI 的配合
minimal_modules: OCSP stapling 初始化与刷新
lectures.practice_task: 配置 ssl_certificate 指向变量化的路径（按 $server_name 选证书），结合源码说明证书是如何被缓存并在握手时选取的。

units.title: stream 与 mail 通用代理

lectures.title: stream 模块：TCP/UDP 代理
lectures.topic: 讲解 ngx_stream 框架如何复用事件核心实现 TCP/UDP 四层代理，stream_core 与 stream_proxy 模块的职责与处理流程。
learning_goals: 理解 stream 与 http 框架的平行结构
掌握 stream_proxy 的双向数据转发
理解 stream 的 phases（preread/log 等）
lectures.practice_task: 配置一个 TCP stream proxy 转发到后端数据库端口，结合源码说明一个新建 TCP 会话的双向转发是如何被事件驱动推进的。

lectures.title: mail 代理框架
lectures.topic: 讲解 ngx_mail 如何代理 SMTP/POP3/IMAP，包含认证（auth_http 外部认证）、协议解析与到后端的代理转发。
learning_goals: 理解 mail 三种协议的 handler 结构
掌握 auth_http 外部认证回调流程
理解 mail_proxy 到后端的转发
lectures.practice_task: 梳理一个 SMTP 客户端从连接 nginx 到通过 auth_http 完成认证、再由 mail_proxy 转发到后端的完整链路。

units.title: 缓存、安全、日志与扩展开发

lectures.title: 共享文件缓存 ngx_http_file_cache
lectures.topic: 讲解 nginx 的反向代理/静态文件共享缓存：缓存键、共享内存元数据、磁盘文件分层目录与缓存失效策略。
learning_goals: 理解缓存键与 cache manager/loader 进程
掌握共享内存中缓存节点的组织
理解缓存过期、purge 与 max_size 控制
lectures.practice_task: 配置一个带 proxy_cache 的反向代理，结合源码说明一个可缓存响应是如何被写入磁盘并在共享内存登记，后续命中如何快速返回。

lectures.title: 访问控制与请求限流
lectures.topic: 讲解 access 模块的 IP 黑白名单、limit_conn 连接数限制、limit_req 的漏桶算法限流及其共享内存状态。
learning_goals: 理解 access 模块基于 CIDR 的判定
掌握 limit_req 的漏桶与突发队列
理解跨 worker 共享的限流计数
lectures.practice_task: 配置 limit_req 限制每秒请求数并允许突发，结合源码解释 rate、burst、nodelay 三个参数在漏桶算法中的具体作用。

lectures.title: 访问日志与 syslog 输出
lectures.topic: 讲解 ngx_http_log_module 的 log_format 定义、惰性求值日志写入，以及 core 层 ngx_syslog 把日志发送到远端的实现。
learning_goals: 理解 log_format 脚本编译与运行时求值
掌握 access_log 的多目标与缓冲写入
理解 syslog 协议封装与重试
lectures.practice_task: 自定义一个 log_format 含若干变量，并把 access_log 同时输出到本地文件与远程 syslog，结合源码说明变量在请求结束时如何被批量求值。

lectures.title: 编写自定义 HTTP 模块（实战）
lectures.topic: 综合前面知识，演示如何用 auto/module 编写一个自定义 content handler 模块：定义 commands、ctx、conf、注册到 phases、编译进 nginx。
learning_goals: 掌握一个最小 HTTP 模块的完整骨架
理解 config 文件如何驱动模块编译（auto/module）
能够实现自定义指令与 content handler
minimal_modules: 模块 ctx 与 commands 定义
lectures.practice_task: 参考 ngx_http_empty_gif_module，编写一个返回固定 JSON 字符串的自定义 content handler 模块，用 auto/module 编译进 nginx 并验证访问。

lectures.title: 调试、错误排查与性能分析
lectures.topic: 讲解 nginx 的调试日志（--with-debug）、常见问题排查手段，以及 google_perftools 等性能剖析工具的集成。
learning_goals: 掌握如何启用与定位 debug 日志
理解常见段错误与连接异常的排查路径
了解 perftools 集成与基本性能剖析
minimal_modules: debug 日志编译与 error_log debug
lectures.practice_task: 用 --with-debug 编译 nginx，配置 error_log debug_http，抓取一次请求的完整 debug 日志，定位请求经过的事件与 phase 步骤。
